pageUrlDesc: What appears in the path and the public pay page heading.
slugInputTitle: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only — e.g. yoga-class. Do not paste https:// or /pay/.
slugHelp: Enter only the slug (e.g. yoga-class), not a full URL. Public page will be /pay/your-slug.
title: Title
subtitle: Subtitle / description
amountDesc: How payers set or see the price on the hosted page.
brandingDesc: Logo, colors, and copy blocks on the public pay experience.
trustPlaceholder: Explain fees, refund policy, or how payers’ data is used. Shown in a highlighted panel on the public page.
colorHelp: Primary drives buttons and key borders. Accent colors the top bar, amount labels, and highlights. The public pay page also uses a soft full-bleed background from these colors. Stored as #primary|#secondary in brand_color.
emptyCustom: No custom fields yet. Add questions to show on the checkout form.
glDesc: Reporter segments attached to every transaction.
glHelp: Letters, numbers, and ._-/ — each segment 2–32 characters. Stored on every transaction for reporting.
emailDesc: Sent to the payer’s email after a successful payment. Configure your domain in Resend so this reaches any customer address, not just test addresses.
publicAccessDesc: Control whether this page is reachable for paying customers.
isActiveHelp: When off, the public /pay link, embed, and payment APIs are unavailable. You can still edit the page here.
